title: Appellate Quarterly - October 2024
content:
## Appellate Quarterly - October 2024
Join McCarthy Tétrault’s National Appellate Litigation Group as we discuss appeals of importance to the Canadian business community during the last quarter. Each session brings you up-to-date on recent appellate developments across Canada. Topics to be discussed this quarter include:
- West: Continuing class action risk for data custodians in Canada
- Québec: Guidance on the criteria for authorization of a class action
- Atlantic : How do courts and tribunals value an expropriated interest in land?
- Federal : Guidance on remedies for patent infringement
- Tax: Federal Court of Appeal finds that financial institutions may recover input tax credits on payments made for loyalty discounts
- Supreme Court of Canada : When may the government be sued for damages because the legislature enacted an unconstitutional law?
Speakers include: Adam Goldenberg , Almut MacDonald , Anu Koshal , Cassidy Bishop , Connor Bildfell , Richard Lizius , Sajeda Hedaraly Note: All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event. This program qualifies for up to 1.5 hours of credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario. Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
For questions about this seminar, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
